response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver cylindrical body and a fine woven metal mesh grille at the top. The body displays a circular logo emblem and the text 'PHANTOM classic' in elegant serif lettering, with 'Nr. 1307' engraved near the base. The microphone is mounted vertically in a silver shock mount cradle with elastic suspension bands. A round black pop filter with dual mesh layers is attached via a gooseneck arm positioned in front of the capsule.", "consistencyTag": "silver-condenser-studio-microphone"}
